overall.description: First-person perspective train journey through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The player character rides an elevated metro train, observing other passengers inside and the dystopian urban landscape outside, passing through stations and dense commercial and industrial districts with prominent neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train interior with padded seats and digital displays

events.description: exterior light brightens significantly as train passes an illuminated section, causing window glare

agents.ego_description: standing or seated inside the metro train, observing the interior and other passengers while the train moves

notable_agents.action: passenger sitting on left bench, hunched over with bag in lap
passenger standing near the train door, holding onto rail

entered.detail: brown padded bench seats with ribbed texture lining the train car walls
glass and metal automatic doors with teal-colored lower panels
illuminated information screen above the door showing route data in cyan text
bright yellow vertical handrail pole for standing passengers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro train car with brown padded seats and digital displays. Two other passengers are visible - one seated on the left hunched over, and another standing by the door. The camera pans slightly, revealing a yellow support pole as the train moves through brightly lit areas causing window glare.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station platform with large illuminated advertisements

events.description: train enters station, transitioning from bright exterior to darker enclosed platform area
platform comes into view with bright 'PURE OVERKILL' advertisement illuminating the scene

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the train as it arrives at the station platform, observing the platform through the window

notable_agents.action: figure standing on the platform near the large advertisement, waiting

entered.detail: interior connecting doors with glowing cyan-tinted glass panels
large illuminated station advertisement reading 'PURE OVERKILL' with 'TEXTPOKIMANE' and 'BYE-BYE BURRITO' text
concrete platform with linear lighting fixtures on the ceiling
vertical digital poster with colorful graphics and 'Chickstador' text

segments.scene_description: The train enters a station, transitioning to a darker, enclosed environment. The camera pans left to reveal cyan-tinted interior doors and the station platform outside. A large 'PURE OVERKILL' billboard dominates the platform view, while a digital poster stands to the right. A lone figure waits on the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track through neon-lit commercial district

events.description: train exits station into open air, revealing elevated track and cityscape views
passing hotel sign and multiple neon billboards as train moves through commercial district

agents.ego_description: riding the elevated train and observing the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape through the window

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings and towers in the distance
illuminated 'HOTEL' sign on a building facade
multiple large digital advertisements with bright colors and animated graphics
multi-level highway overpass structure running parallel to the train tracks
tall buildings with illuminated blue windows reflecting the city lights

segments.scene_description: The train exits the station onto elevated tracks, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at night. The camera looks out at towering glass office buildings with blue-lit windows, neon billboards, and complex highway overpasses. A distant hotel sign is visible as the train moves through the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with brutalist green buildings and smoke stacks

events.description: train passes through area with thick smoke plumes rising from industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the train through the industrial sector, passing close to concrete buildings and infrastructure

entered.detail: massive concrete industrial structures with minimal windows and utilitarian design
thick dark smoke rising from industrial vents and stacks into the overcast sky
metal security fencing running alongside the train tracks
tall residential towers with distinctive green-tinted exterior walls and small windows

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dense industrial district, passing close to massive concrete buildings and chain-link fencing. Thick smoke plumes rise from industrial stacks into the hazy sky. The architecture shifts to brutalist green apartment blocks and utilitarian structures as the train continues on elevated tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior with seated passenger in glowing neon accessories

events.description: camera turns away from exterior view to focus on interior of train car and other passengers

agents.ego_description: turning attention from the window to observe a fellow passenger with distinctive glowing clothing sitting nearby

notable_agents.action: passenger sitting on right bench wearing green glowing shorts and looking down at something in their hands

entered.detail: brown ribbed bench seat in the foreground
glowing cyan interior doors at the end of the train car
large window showing passing industrial buildings outside

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to the train interior, focusing on a passenger sitting on the right bench wearing distinctive glowing green shorts and accessories. The cyan interior doors are visible at the far end of the car, while the train window shows the industrial district still passing by outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from the interior of a futuristic metro train as it travels from a sterile transit hub through a sprawling, neon-lit metropolis and into a gritty industrial zone. It begins inside the car among a few passengers, where the camera pans past brown padded seats and a yellow support pole amidst the glare of passing lights. As the train glides into a station, the environment shifts to a darker, enclosed space, revealing cyan-tinted doors and a platform dominated by a massive Pure Overkill billboard. The scene then expands as the train exits onto elevated tracks, transitioning from the towering glass office buildings and blue-lit neon of the commercial district to a bleak industrial landscape of concrete walls, chain-link fences, and rising plumes of smoke. Finally, the camera turns back toward the interior to focus on a passenger in glowing green attire while the brutalist architecture of the industrial district continues to blur past the window.
